name: Blue Sass
description: Cool. Sarcastic. Probably judging you right now.

specialSkill.name: Magnet
specialSkill.description: Move one player within 10 spaces of you to your space.

name: Red Rage
description: Hot-headed and always ready to blame the dice.

specialSkill.name: Rage Reroll
specialSkill.description: Arm your next question mark so you can reroll the die.

name: Yellow Sarcasm
description: Smart mouth. Sharper moves. Zero regrets.

specialSkill.name: Switcheroo
specialSkill.description: Swap places with any player within 10 spaces of you.

specialSkill.name: Intersect
specialSkill.description: Pull yourself and the closest player within 10 spaces to the median space between you and them. Cannot be used when only 1 space apart.

specialSkill.name: Peek-a-Boo
specialSkill.description: Move the closest player within 10 spaces to the next question mark space within 10 spaces of them. Choose the target when multiple closest players share the same space.

name: Parkour Joe
description: Agile. Fearless. Always on the move.

specialSkill.name: Parkour
specialSkill.description: Roll a special die with 7–10 movement results plus Bee Swarm, Dung, Misdirect, and Weakened icons.

name: Bomber Jack
description: Explosive. Bold. Always ready to blow things up.

specialSkill.name: Hidden Mine
specialSkill.description: Place a private mine anywhere from square 2 to 99 except question marks, ladder-connected squares, or edge squares. When another player lands on it, they are blown 1-4 spaces backward without crossing the row edge.

name: Crab Karen
description: Crab Mentality. Demanding. Always ready to complain.

specialSkill.name: Ragebait
specialSkill.description: Select a player anywhere on the board then move them 15 spaces backwards. After the move, the skill user cannot move for next 2 turns as a consequence.

name: Brave Bob
description: Clever. Resourceful. Always finding a way out.

passiveSkill.name: Fighter Spirit
passiveSkill.description: When arming the weapon, it has 30% chance to extend the duration of the weapon by 2 more turns.

name: Crybaby Curl
description: Sensitive. Emotional. Always on the verge of tears.

passiveSkill.name: Fight or Flight
passiveSkill.description: When encountering an entity, it has 15% chance to skip the attack sequence and move back to previous space OR continue the attack sequence but successfully defended it even without arming the weapon.

passiveSkill.name: Concentrate
passiveSkill.description: After completing a move, has a 15% chance to reveal the positions of all the entities for 2 seconds.

name: Energetic Sam
description: Energetic. Enthusiastic. Always full of life.

passiveSkill.name: Optimistic Mind
passiveSkill.description: When encountering an entity while on the move, has a 15% chance to ignore it (does not trigger the attack sequence) and continue moving. This skill does not work when the move ends on the square with the entity.

name: Big Daddy
description: Strong. Dominant. Always ready to take charge.

skills.name: Handy
skills.effect: Can carry one additional item in the loadout (Maximum of 1 item).

skills.name: Dad Strength
skills.effect: When activated, the next melee attack will deal double damage.

name: Angel
description: Strict. Disciplined. Always ready for everything.

skills.name: Lionheart
skills.effect: When health is below 30 points, boost all attack damage by 10%.

skills.name: Girl Scout
skills.effect: Heal 30 health points without consuming any heal items.

name: Luisa
description: Alert. Survivalist. Ready to face the unknowns.

skills.name: Portable Workbench
skills.effect: Has 15% chance to double the ammo capacity of the next picked up weapon.

skills.name: Survival Instinct
skills.effect: When activated, reveal the positions of all enemies within 10 spaces from all directions for 3 seconds.

skills.name: Braveheart
skills.effect: When health is below 30 points, reduce all damage taken by 15%.

skills.name: Power Strike
skills.effect: When activated, the next melee attack will stun the target on its next turn, not global turn.

name: Speed
description: Fast. Agile. Always on the move.

skills.name: Evasive Maneuver
skills.effect: When attacked by any weapon, except snipers, has a 20% chance to dodge the attack.

skills.name: Extra Steps
skills.effect: When activated, boost by 2 available move spaces to all directions for 2 global turns, including the current global turn.

skills.name: Scavenger
skills.effect: For the next spawn turn of items and weapons, 20% chance for a random weapon and item to be dropped 1 square closer to the character in different directions.

skills.name: Adventurer's Spirit
skills.effect: When activated, allow movement to extend by 10 spaces to all directions for the current turn. If the character is already on the edge of the board, then the movement will be limited to the available spaces.
